aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business prominently due to limited conversational content and authority signals. The current site lacks the depth needed for AI to confidently recommend it for complex HVAC queries.
quick_wins: Expand content to include detailed how-to guides and troubleshooting FAQs.
Incorporate structured data for FAQPage and HowTo schema.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema for location-based queries.
FAQPage schema is present but lacks depth; needs more detailed questions and answers.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks or troubleshooting.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Complex HVAC queries such as 'how to fix a leaking radiator' or 'best practices for HVAC maintenance'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Add detailed how-to guides and expand FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish expert-backed articles and obtain certifications or partnerships with HVAC industry bodies.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by becoming the go-to HVAC expert in Aurora.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks the detailed, conversational content that AI models prioritize when citing sources.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement a robust AEO strategy with expanded, authoritative content and enhanced schema markup to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Leads with AI-Ready Content & Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your site and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out in AI-driven search results.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your content and schema to become an AI-recommended HVAC leader.
